ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., decision tree, random forest, neural network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "training_recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the training dataset */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the training dataset */,
  "training_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the training dataset */,
  "test_recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the testing dataset */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the testing dataset */,
  "test_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the testing dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluation_by FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the program belongs to */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Program code for the model (e.g., decision tree, random forest, neural network) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the program code */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the program */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_programs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_programs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_programs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., CSV, database, API) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data source */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the data comes from */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data used for training and testing the model */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* JSON object containing preprocessing steps applied to the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, administrator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
